quality.description_clarity: The description is clear and follows standard D&D 5e formatting. It details the selection process, mechanical benefits (advantage on Survival/Intelligence checks), and the language acquisition aspect.
quality.completeness: The description accurately reflects the breadth of the feature, including the subsequent choices at levels 6 and 14.

mechanics.core_benefit: Grants advantage on tracking (Survival) and recall (Intelligence) checks against a chosen enemy type.
mechanics.scope_of_choice: Allows selection of a type (aberrations, beasts, etc.) or two specific humanoid races.
mechanics.progression: Explicitly mentions gaining one additional favored enemy and language choice at levels 6 and 14.

analysis.archival_notes: This is the core Ranger feature that significantly enhances niche tracking and knowledge gathering against specific threats. The structure is typical for foundational class features.
